name: AdditionalPasteSettings_CoreNest
title: Additional Paste Settings (Extended)
author: CoreNest ; based on Billbo99; Original author: Shirkit
description: Fork maintained separately from the original Additional Paste Settings. Adds additional paste settings for the game (shift+right click -> shift+left click), such as merging/combining requests at logistic chests, setting a fixed request multiplier, allow you to modify the 30 seconds vanilla behaviour and allow pasting from assemblers into inserters to set a condition on them.
